title: Condition Node Schema
description: Schema for nodes in the project condition graph. Each node represents a specific construction condition on a project.

node_id.description: Unique identifier for this condition node within the graph.

condition_type.description: The type of construction condition. Must map to a supported kernel condition type.

position_ref.description: Reference to position or location on the project (e.g., grid line, area ID).

material_context.description: Optional material context hint for this condition.

metadata.description: Additional metadata for this condition node.
